title: Data view
description: A structured data and settings contract for interactive data presentation.
limitations: This is a different author job from a small Markdown table.

gap.reason: No bounded portable data source, settings, interaction and rendering contract is accepted for Docara.
gap.fallback: Use the supported native.table entry for small reference data.
gap.admission_condition: Define a separate portable data and settings contract with deterministic rendering, accessibility, tests and documentation.
